title: Raph's Battle Royale mod
description: A mod that adds items for you to easily make your own Battle Royale maps with.
body:
This mod has a ton of items that you can use to easily make your own battle royale maps!

**Items in the mod right now include:**

**Ranged Weapons:**
- Tnt Arrow Launcher: Shoots arrows that explode on impact. Uses Tnt Arrows for ammo.
- Lava Arrow Shooter: Spawns a 3x3 area of lava wherever the arrow lands. Uses Lava arrows for ammo.
- Water Arrow Shooter: Spawns a 3x3 area of water where the arrow lands. Uses Water arrows for ammo.
- Cobweb Arrow Shooter: Spawns a 3x3 area of cobwebs wherever the arrow lands. Uses Cobweb arrows for ammo.
- Teleport Arrow Launcher: Teleports you to wherever the arrow lands. Uses Tp arrows for ammo.
- Flamethrower: Shoots flames at a very rapid speed. Uses Fire Charges as ammo.
- Sniper: Shoot a High damaging arrow that flies really far. Uses Heavy Arrow for ammo.
- Pistol: An unbreakable weapon that does  a low amount of damage. Uses Light arrows for ammo.


**Melee Weapons:** 

**Knifes:** 

There is currently only 3 knifes in the mod. These consist of the Common, Rare and Legendary knife. Each knife provides you with speed 1 while you hold it. Higher rarity knifes also do more damage. All knifes are also unbreakable.


**Armor:**
There is currently 3 armor sets in the mod. These consist of the Common, Rare and Legendary Armor sets. Each rarity provides slightly more protection compared to the previous rarity armor set.
They also gain more durability.
The armor sets from weak to strong are: Common, Rare, Legendary.


**Consumables:**
There is only 1 consumable item as of this version. This item is the bandage. When consumes the bandage will provide you with regeneration 1 for 20 seconds. They can be crafted using 3 paper. Bandages will also give you vack 1 paper after use.


**Misc. Items:**
Item Scrap: When you place a Common, Rare or Legendary item in the crafting grid, you can craft it into item scrap of the same rarity. This scrap can then be used to either craft a new knife (Crafted like a sword but with only 1 material and a stick), New armor (Crafted the same way to craft any other armor) or even crafted into brand new crates that contain new loot(By putting 4 of the same rarity scrap in a crafting menu in a 2x2 formation. 


**Blocks:**
As of right now there are a few variations of the same block. This block is the crate block. When broken in survival mode the crate will drop loot specific to the type of crate. 

**The different kinds of crates are:**
- Regular Crate: Drops sticks, paper, bandages, item scrap and food.
- Ammo Crate: Drops different kinds of ammo.
- Food Crate: Drops random food items including golden apples and bandages.
- Weapon Crate: Drops random ranged weapons from the mod.
- Common Crate: Drops Common Armor and Knifes with random enchantments.
- Rare Crates: Drops Rare armor and knifes with slightly better enchantments compared to Common.
- Legendary Crates: Drops Legendary armor and knifes with even better enchantments compared to rare.


**How to use this mod to make your own battle royale map:**

Simply place down different kinds of crates in the world you want to use. The crates have LootTables assigned to them, so you dont have to do anything other than to place them.
**Be sure to make a backup of your world since the Tnt Arrow Launcher, lava Arrow Shooter, water Arrow Shooter, and cobweb Arrow Shooter do have the potential to break blocks.**

**Future plans:**
There is a few features I have planned for the future. These include:
- Grenades.
- Airstrikes.
- Even more unique and powerful weapons.
- Sprite Reworks.
- Some sort of quiver system to put your ammo into to lower inventory clutter.
And much more!

I hope you enjoy playing with this mod as much as I did while testing it. if you have any suggestions or ideas for features that could be added, feel free to join the discord server.
